name: Island Black Bean & Rice Salad
recipeIngredient: 1 can (15 oz) Whole black beans, drained
recipeInstructions:
1. Peel the avocado, remove the pit, and dice it into a small bowl.
2. Pour lime juice over the diced avocado and toss to evenly coat.
3. In a large bowl, combine cooked rice, drained black beans, green onions, cilantro, olive oil, salt, and pepper.
4. Stir to evenly mix all ingredients.
5. Add the diced avocado and gently stir to incorporate.
6. Taste the salad and adjust seasoning as needed before serving.
Source/Author: Simply Seafood / typo Bob Shiells
Nutrition:
- Calories per Serving: 424
- Total Fat (g): 15
- Saturated Fat (g): 2
- Protein (g): 12
- Sodium (g): 8
- Cholesterol (mg): 0
- Carbohydrates (g): 69
